% This is generated by ESQL's FieldExtractFlattenedTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
FROM cross_cluster_failures
| EVAL result = FIELD_EXTRACT_FLATTENED(flattened, "_clusters.details")
| MV_EXPAND result
| WHERE FIELD_EXTRACT(result, "status") == "successful"
| STATS count = COUNT() BY result
| KEEP result, count
```

| result:flattened | count:long |
| --- | --- |
| {"status":"successful"} | 13 |
